title: Stenogrammitis subcoriacea
taxonomy: Stenogrammitis subcoriacea is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It belongs to the genus Stenogrammitis, which is a group of ferns commonly found in tropical regions. The Polypodiaceae family is a large group of ferns that also includes other species such as Polypodium and Drynaria. Stenogrammitis subcoriacea is further classified as a member of the subfamily Polypodiinae within the Polypodiaceae family. The classification of Stenogrammitis subcoriacea reflects its evolutionary relationships with other ferns.
